temporal_description: The audio opens with a deep, resonant, and suspenseful musical score. A low, pulsing electronic beat creates a tense and serious atmosphere, suggesting a high-stakes or clandestine situation. A medium-wide shot captures two men in dark business suits walking toward the camera on a dimly lit outdoor walkway at night. The man on the left is older, with white hair, and the man on the right is younger. Both carry briefcases. The background is dark, punctuated by the bright, square lights of street lamps and the railing of an overpass. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the top right corner. The camera slowly zooms in, tightening the frame on the two men as they approach. The music gradually builds in intensity, with layers of synthesized tones and a slow, deliberate rhythm that evokes a sense of mystery and anticipation, as if leading up to a significant, undisclosed event. The camera cuts to a close-up, side-profile shot of the older man. His face is partially illuminated, highlighting his serious expression as he looks forward. The background is dark and out of focus, with a single, bright light creating a soft glow behind him. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner.
